tweets_created_today.draft:
2026 prediction: Agentic AI will kill more SaaS companies than OpenAI.

Why? Autonomous agents don't just answer questions—they execute workflows. ChatGPT is search. Agents are infrastructure.

The era of wrapper apps is ending.

Are you building a tool or an agent?

engagement_tactics.example: Engage with Gartner tech trend posts. Add perspective on how AI-native platforms impact developer workflows and security.
Find posts discussing AI disruption of SaaS. Share nuanced view on infrastructure vs. applications—agents aren't replacing everything.
Engage with posts on prompt optimization challenges. Mention Mdify's markdown preprocessing as a signal-to-noise solution when genuinely relevant.
Engage meaningfully with OpenClaw skill creators and agent builders. Technical discussion > promotion.

engagement_strategy.quality_filter: Each engagement adds genuine technical insight or perspective. No 'great post!' replies. Build credibility through substance, not volume.
